race.description: Albies Rugby Club Peter Mccue Cup Handicap (Bm66)
race.comment: ZELESTIAL (3) sharp winner two-back over the mile with the 60.5kg. Blew the start last start and never travelled in the soft (6) going with a disappointing seventh over 2000m at Taree as the dominant fav. Strips fitter for this and deserves another chance. SONDER (11) racing in a rich vein of form and due for a change of luck. Kept coming with the 59kg for a game second over 1900m at this track in C1 class. Doesn't have to improve much from the low gate. THE MANAGER (6) three runs back have been okay and stretches out to this trip for the first time today. Blinkers come off from the good draw and gets map favours to run the trip out. VISUALISE (5) has won his last two and while this is harder, he obviously holds solid claims again.
